_readme: INSTRUCTIONS: This file is a placeholder. To upload to RapidAPI:
_step2: Paste its contents here (replacing this entire file), OR
_step3: In RapidAPI Studio: API Hub → Import Requests → Upload a File → navigate to: deploy/openapi.json
_tip: If drag-and-drop fails (file disappears on drop), use the 'Upload a File' button instead.
